generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who remembers the Cold War, I'm deeply concerned about the current state of our national security. The world is more dangerous than ever, and we can't afford to cut defense spending. Our military needs modern equipment to deter threats and protect our allies. Some politicians talk about 'wasteful spending,' but the real waste is putting our safety at risk. We need strong leadership that understands the cost of weakness. #NationalSecurity #DefenseMatters
